name: X-GOLF SAUK VALLEY
about: X-Golf Sauk Valley operates as a golf simulator venue, featuring technology that bills itself as the most accurate and innovative in the world. The facility offers a variety of services including booking, contact information, and the availability of gift cards and punch cards for repeat customers. The establishment highlights specific features such as parking, wheelchair accessibility, free WIFI, and acceptance of debit and credit cards, positioning itself as a locally owned option that provides both family fun and the capacity for private events. While specific details on technology, pricing, or amenities are limited in the provided context, the venue aims to cater to a diverse range of patrons seeking an indoor golf experience.
